name: VideoVault Premiere Extension
releaseNotes:
- Bumped the Premiere extension release line to `1.8.5`.
- Increased the proxy bridge timeout for longer NAS-resolution requests.
- Kept the existing proxy history and request-tracking UI intact.
- Updated the shipped extension version to `1.8.5`.
- Increased the `PROXY_NEEDED` desktop bridge wait window from `10s` to `30s`.
- Prevented false negative proxy-create messaging when the desktop app needs more time to resolve the correct NAS and return queued job details.
- Extension version bumped to `1.8.5`.
- Update `extensions/adobe-premiere/latest.json` in `videovault-release-updates` after packaging the new macOS and Windows installers.
- Release tag should follow:
- `premiere-extension-v1.8.5`
